query:
INSERT INTO laptops (name, processor, graphicsCard, ram, storage, display, operatingSystem, condition, warranty, price) VALUES 
('Alienware 18 Area-51 (2025)', 'Intel Core Ultra 9 275HX', 'NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070', '32 GB RAM', '1 TB SSD', '18" large gaming', 'Windows 11 Pro', 'New', '2 years', 11500),
('Dell Precision 7680 (2025)', 'Intel Core i9 vPro (up to 24 cores)', 'Professional graphics card 6 GB', '64 GB DDR5 RAM', '1 TB fast NVMe SSD', '16" high-resolution touchscreen', 'Windows 11 Pro', 'New, in box', 'Official from manufacturer', 7900),
('Lenovo ThinkPad T14 Gen 6 (2025)', 'Intel Core Ultra', 'Intel Graphics', '32 GB DDR5 RAM (5600 MHz)', '512 GB SSD NVMe', '14" IPS 1920×1200', 'Windows 11 Pro', 'New, in box', 'Official from manufacturer', 4100),
('Dell Pro 14 Plus (Transformer)', 'Intel Core Ultra 5 Vpro', '-', '32 GB RAM', '512 GB SSD NVMe', '14" 1920×1200 touchscreen', 'Windows 11', 'New', 'Official', 3900),
('HP ZBook Power 16 G11 (2025)', 'Intel Core Ultra 7 265H', 'NVIDIA RTX 1000 8 GB', '32 GB RAM', '1 TB SSD', '16"', '-', 'NEW (2025)', '3 years official', 8499),
('Dell Pro 14 Plus (Ultrabook)', 'Intel Core Ultra 5 238V', '-', '32 GB RAM', '512 GB SSD', '14" IPS, high clarity', '-', 'NEW (2025)', '3 years official', 4199),
('Dell Pro 14 Premium (2025)', 'Intel Core Ultra 5 236V (AI-ready, vPro)', 'Intel Arc', '16 GB', '512 GB SSD', '14" IPS FHD+ (1920×1200), anti-glare', '-', 'NEW (2025)', '3 years official', 4299),
('Dell Pro Max 18 Plus MB18250', 'Intel Core Ultra 9 285HX', '24 GB (Multiple GPUs)', '32 GB RAM', '477 GB SSD', '18" (non-touch)', 'Windows 11 Pro', 'New', 'Official from manufacturer', 17999);
